name: lab-report-generator-web
description: AI-assisted lab report generator web app

scripts.postinstall: (python3 -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/pip install --upgrade pip && .venv/bin/pip install -r requirements.txt || echo 'WARN: python venv setup failed — hwpx output will be unavailable, docx still works'); bash scripts/install-tectonic.sh || echo 'WARN: tectonic setup failed — re-typeset PDF unavailable'; bash scripts/install-pandoc.sh || echo 'WARN: pandoc setup failed — docx→hwpx unavailable'
